## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] Docker build or compose validation
- [ ] Not run (explain why)

## Docs and Config

- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] New env vars or secrets documented
- [ ] No secrets added to tracked files

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is narrow and focused
- [ ] Commit messages follow repo conventions
- [ ] Security and local-first behavior were preserved
